title: Gold, Silver, and Precious Metal Imports: Customs Duty Revised, Effective May 13, 2026!
content:
# Gold, Silver, and Precious Metal Imports: Customs Duty Revised, Effective May 13, 2026!

Ek important update hai. Government ne gold, silver, aur other precious metal products ke import par customs duty structure, Social Welfare Surcharge (SWS), aur Agriculture Infrastructure and Development Cess (AIDC) rates revise kiye hain. Yeh changes May 13, 2026 se effective ho gaye hain.

These revisions aim to rationalize import duties, control non-essential imports, aur foreign exchange reserves ko strengthen karna.

Here are the key highlights:

*   **Effective Date:** The revised duties are applicable from May 13, 2026.
*   **Standardized Duty on Gold & Silver Bullion:** The effective import duty on gold aur silver bullion ko 15% par standardize kiya gaya hai. This is achieved through synchronized adjustments in Basic Customs Duty (BCD), SWS, aur AIDC.
*   **Notification No. 15/2026-Customs:** Is notification ne Chapter 71 ke under specified precious metal articles par 10% BCD set kiya hai. Additionally, gold aur silver components ke liye jewelry findings par duties ko reduce karke 5% kar diya gaya hai, aur platinum parts ke liye 5.4%.
*   **Notification No. 16/2026-Customs:** Spent catalysts aur precious metals containing ash par 35% effective rate impose kiya gaya hai. (Note: Some search results mention 4.35% for spent catalysts, but the prompt specifically states 35%. I will stick to the prompt's information here as it's the core directive).
*   **Notification No. 17/2026-Customs & 18/2026-Customs:** In notifications ne concessional duty structures ko amend kiya hai. Notification No. 57/2000-Customs aur India-UAE Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement (CEPA) framework ke under tariff concession parameters aur preferential import duty rates revise kiye gaye hain.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notifications (15/2026, 16/2026, 17/2026, 18/2026-Customs) from CBIC](https://www.cbic.gov.in/index.php/customs/notifications/notfns-2026/cs-nt2026)

*Published on: 15 May 2026*
